operator.plain_action: VPN core is healthy. Do not restart NL; collect fresh evidence during the next visible outage.

commands.expected: prints snapshot path and refresh report path; vpn-planning-refresh ok=true
commands.writes: local snapshot and local reports only; NL read-only commands only

commands.expected: decision, confidence, blocking trend, failover status

decision_table.do: observe; test affected app/media path separately
decision_table.do_not: restart x-ui, change NL, auto-switch profile, use SPB
touch NL before local client is healthy

decision_table.do: build provider packet from fresh snapshot
decision_table.do_not: restart services to mask provider or host symptoms

decision_table.do: manual profile review only after fresh evidence and explicit approval
inspect NL services/listeners read-only and prepare backup/rollback
decision_table.do_not: write to NL without separate approval

blocked_actions: do not restart x-ui from app/blocking evidence alone
do not change NL without explicit write approval
do not use SPB as fallback while SPB is disabled
do not store raw VPN URIs, UUIDs, private keys, or bot tokens in reports
